---
name: Release Tracking
about: Track an upcoming release or version milestone
title: '[RELEASE] '
labels: release
assignees: ''
---

## Release Version
**Version**: [e.g., v1.0.0, v2.4.0]

## Release Type
What type of release is this?

- [ ] Major Release (breaking changes)
- [ ] Minor Release (new features)
- [ ] Patch Release (bug fixes)
- [ ] Beta / Pre-release
- [ ] Hotfix

## Planned Features
List the planned features and enhancements for this release.

| Feature | Status | Notes |
|---------|--------|-------|
| Feature 1 | [ ] In Progress | |
| Feature 2 | [ ] Pending | |
| Feature 3 | [ ] Completed | |

## Bug Fixes
List the bugs that will be fixed in this release.

| Bug | Status | Related Issue |
|-----|--------|---------------|
| Bug description | [ ] Fixed | #123 |

## Breaking Changes
List any breaking changes that users need to be aware of.

- Change 1: Description and migration guide
- Change 2: Description and migration guide

## Release Notes (Draft)
Draft release notes for this release.

```markdown
## What's Changed

* New Feature 1 by @username
* Bug fix 2 by @username
* Improvement 3 by @username

## Upgrade Guide

Instructions for upgrading from the previous version.
```

## Target Date
**Planned Release Date**: [YYYY-MM-DD]

## Additional Notes
Any additional information about this release.

---

**Milestone**: [Link to milestone]
